records.question: Which customers with a Good Credit Rating raised a Product Unusable complaint on 1973-02-10 22:55:56 about products priced at least 35.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
JOIN products ON complaints.product_id = products.product_id
WHERE customers.customer_type_code = 'Good Credit Rating' AND complaints.complaint_type_code = 'Product Unusable' AND complaints.date_complaint_raised = '1973-02-10 22:55:56' AND products.product_price >= 35.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Customers.customer_id
FROM Customers
JOIN Complaints ON Customers.customer_id = Complaints.customer_id
JOIN Products ON Complaints.product_id = Products.product_id
WHERE Customers.customer_type_code = 'Good Credit Rating'
  AND Complaints.complaint_type_code = 'Product Unusable'
  AND Complaints.date_complaint_raised = '1973-02-10 22:55:56'
  AND Products.product_price >= 35.0

records.question: Who are the customers from Tennessee who have made complaints about any products?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
JOIN products ON complaints.product_id = products.product_id
WHERE customers.state = 'Tennessee'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Customers.customer_id
FROM Customers
JOIN Complaints ON Customers.customer_id = Complaints.customer_id
WHERE Customers.state = 'Tennessee'

records.question: Which customers with Defaults on payments have complaints that are exactly Product Failure and were closed on or before 1976-04-19 11:03:06?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
WHERE complaints.complaint_type_code = 'Product Failure' AND customers.customer_type_code = 'Defaults on payments' AND complaints.date_complaint_closed <= '1976-04-19 11:03:06'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Customers.customer_id
FROM Customers
JOIN Complaints ON Customers.customer_id = Complaints.customer_id
WHERE Customers.customer_type_code = 'Defaults on payments'
  AND Complaints.complaint_type_code = 'Product Failure'
  AND Complaints.date_complaint_closed <= '1976-04-19 11:03:06'

records.question: Which customers living in Apt. 495 have open complaints?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
WHERE complaints.complaint_status_code = 'Open' AND customers.address_line_2 = 'Apt. 495'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Customers.customer_id
FROM Customers
JOIN Complaints ON Customers.customer_id = Complaints.customer_id
WHERE Customers.address_line_2 = 'Apt. 495'
  AND Complaints.complaint_status_code = 'open'

records.question: Which customers live at 039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537 in Sauerberg and have open complaints handled by a male staff member named Ward whose phone number is (379)551-0838x146?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
JOIN staff ON complaints.staff_id = staff.staff_id
WHERE customers.town_city = 'Sauerberg' AND staff.gender = '0' AND customers.address_line_1 = '039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537' AND staff.first_name = 'Ward' AND complaints.complaint_status_code = 'Open' AND staff.phone_number = '(379)551-0838x146'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Customers.customer_id
FROM Customers
JOIN Complaints ON Customers.customer_id = Complaints.customer_id
JOIN Staff ON Complaints.staff_id = Staff.staff_id
WHERE Customers.address_line_1 = '039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537'
  AND Customers.town_city = 'Sauerberg'
  AND Complaints.complaint_status_code = 'open'
  AND Staff.gender = 'M'
  AND Staff.last_name = 'Ward'
  AND Staff.phone_number = '(379)551-0838x146'

records.question: Who are the customers in Iowa with phone number 578.019.7943x328 living in West Annamariestad’s Suite 035 who have complaints marked OK raised on or after 2002-07-18 10:59:35?

SELECT Customers.customer_id
FROM Customers
JOIN Complaints ON Customers.customer_id = Complaints.customer_id
WHERE Customers.state = 'Iowa'

  AND Customers.town_city = 'West Annamariestad'
  AND Complaints.complaint_outcome_code = 'OK'
  AND Complaints.date_complaint_raised >= '2002-07-18 10:59:35'

records.question: Where are the customers located who live at 1566 Ramona Overpass Apt. 464 with an address line 2 of Suite 151 in Florida?
